headline: Pull-Ups® Debuts Learning Layer™ Technology to Help Kids Learn Wet From Dry During Potty Training and Help Build Confidence
summary: TORONTO, June 08, 2026--Pull-Ups®, a Kimberly-Clark brand, has introduced Learning Layer™ technology in Canada, addressing a common challenge in potty training: recognizing the difference between wet and dry. The training pant innovation is designed to help kids notice wetness during potty training while supporting independence and confidence during this key developmental milestone.
